title: Urgent Monthly Report

metadata.description: Summarize the monthly sales data and send it to the management team by end of day.

reasoning: Category: Keyword match: revenue, report | Priority: Keyword analysis: detected urgent, risk:send
steps: Read and understand the full task description.
Review the sales context and client history.
Draft the proposal or outreach material.

raw_content:
# Urgent Monthly Report

Summarize the monthly sales data and send it to the management team by end of day.

Requirements:
- Include total revenue numbers
- Compare with last month
- Highlight top performing products
- Add recommendations for next month
- Keep it under 2 pages
